title: The Coffee Bean India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: The Coffee Bean India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
The Coffee Bean India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Floor Manager to join our dynamic team in Surat. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About The Coffee Bean India:
The Coffee Bean India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with The Coffee Bean India!
